summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Business Radar AI application. Backend APIs: 100% pass rate (41/41 tests). Frontend: All major features functional with CRED-inspired dark theme. Identified 1 minor frontend RBAC issue with Add Business button visibility for Subscriber role.

ui_bugs.issue: Add Business button (+ Add) visible for Subscriber role in top-right actions
ui_bugs.expected: Button should be hidden for Subscriber role (read-only access)
ui_bugs.actual: Button is always rendered without role check
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add role check: {user?.role !== 'Subscriber' && <Link to='/businesses/new' className='btn-primary'><Plus className='h-4 w-4' /> Add</Link>}

design_issues.issue: Discovery nav item not visible for Subscriber role
design_issues.note: Expected Discovery to be visible for Subscriber but it's hidden. May be intentional design decision.

passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/)
Authentication: Admin/Analyst/Subscriber login with correct credentials
Authentication: Bad credentials return 401
Authentication: GET /api/auth/me returns current user
Authentication: Password reset with current/new password
Authentication: Google OAuth status returns configured=false
Dashboard: GET /api/dashboard returns KPIs and analytics
Users CRUD: Admin can list/create/update/delete users
Users CRUD: Analyst cannot access (403)
Businesses CRUD: List with pagination and filters
Businesses CRUD: Create with AI enrichment (6-10 sec)
Businesses CRUD: Get detail with predictions and lead scores
Businesses CRUD: Update business
Businesses CRUD: Re-run AI enrichment
Businesses CRUD: Filter by city works correctly
Businesses CRUD: Subscriber cannot create (403)
Discovery: List connectors (5 connectors including sample_seed)
Discovery: Run sample_seed with limit=3
Reports: List reports
Reports: Get today's report (auto-generated)
Reports: Generate report
Reports: Get report detail
Settings: Admin can get/update settings
Settings: Analyst cannot access (403)
Audit Logs: Admin can list and filter by action
Audit Logs: Analyst cannot access (403)
Preferences: Get and update preferences
Scheduler: Admin can get status and run-now
Scheduler: Analyst cannot access (403)
CSV Upload: Preview mode returns row count
CSV Upload: Ingestion mode processes rows with deduplication
Frontend: Login page renders with CRED dark theme (rgb(12,12,14))
Frontend: Login redirects to dashboard after successful auth
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 KPI cards (Total, Today's New, Hot Leads, Avg Score)
Frontend: Dashboard renders 36 SVG chart elements (Recharts)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 7-day trend, by-city, by-category, by-predicted-need
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows all 9 expected items for Admin
Frontend: Businesses page with filters (pincode, city, state, category, lead, score, date, source)
Frontend: Businesses page with search bar and paginated table
Frontend: Businesses page with CSV/Excel export buttons
Frontend: Add Business form with 18 fields
Frontend: CSV Upload page with file input
Frontend: Discovery page with connectors and run buttons
Frontend: Reports page with today's report and past reports list
Frontend: Preferences page with 2 toggle switches
Frontend: Admin Users page lists 5 users
Frontend: Admin Settings page with tabbed groups (Google OAuth, Email, Discovery, Scheduler)
Frontend: Admin Audit Logs page with 26+ entries and filter capability
Frontend: Admin Scheduler page shows status=Running, next run, recent runs
Frontend: RBAC - Analyst role hides Admin section correctly
Frontend: RBAC - Subscriber role hides Admin section, Add Business nav, CSV Upload nav
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend RBAC issue: Add role check in /app/frontend/src/pages/Businesses.jsx line 165 to hide '+ Add' button for Subscriber role. Verify if Discovery nav item should be visible for Subscriber role (currently hidden).
